summary: Phase 1 Dynamic Roles System - All features tested and working. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Login with admin@redribbonops.com / admin123
GET /api/roles returns all 31 seeded roles
GET /api/roles?role_type=service_provider returns 29 service providers
GET /api/roles?role_type=system returns 2 system roles (Admin, Requester)
POST /api/roles creates a new custom role
PATCH /api/roles/{id} updates role (non-system)
DELETE /api/roles/{id} deactivates role (soft delete)
System roles cannot be modified (returns 400 error)
System roles cannot be deleted (returns 400 error)
POST /api/users with service provider role works correctly
POST /api/users with invalid role returns 400 error
PATCH /api/users/{id} can change user role to service provider
GET /api/roles/service-providers returns roles that can pick orders
Service provider roles have can_pick_orders=True
System roles have correct permissions (can_create_orders=True, can_pick_orders=False)
Sidebar shows 'Roles' link for admin
Roles page loads with correct stats (31 Total, 29 Service Providers, 29 Can Pick Orders, 0 Custom)
Roles page shows 3 tabs: Service Providers (29), System Roles (2), Custom (0)
Service Providers tab shows all 29 service provider roles with icons and badges
System Roles tab shows Admin and Requester with 'System' badge
Custom tab shows 'No custom roles yet' message with create button
Add Role button opens dialog with correct form fields
Add Role dialog has: Display Name, Description, Role Type, Icon, Color, Permissions
Users page role dropdown shows grouped roles (System Roles, Service Providers)
Creating a user with service provider role works correctly
Dashboard loads correctly for admin
critical_code_review_comments: All 31 roles seeded correctly (2 system + 29 service providers)
Role validation working - invalid roles rejected when creating users
System role protection working - cannot modify or delete Admin/Requester
SMTP email sending is MOCKED (as expected per requirements)
seed_data_creation: 31 roles seeded via /api/seed endpoint - 2 system roles (Admin, Requester) + 29 service provider roles (Editor, Photographer, Videographer, DroneOperator, Stager, VirtualStager, FloorplanDesigner, HomeInspector, Appraiser, MortgageBroker, TitleCompany, Surveyor, GeneralContractor, Electrician, Plumber, HVACTechnician, Roofer, Painter, Landscaper, Cleaner, PestControl, Locksmith, GraphicDesigner, SocialMediaManager, Copywriter, SEOSpecialist, WebDeveloper, PrintSpecialist, SignInstaller)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Dynamic Roles System fully functional. 31 roles seeded (2 system + 29 service providers). Roles page shows all roles with tabs for Service Providers, System Roles, and Custom. Users page role dropdown shows grouped roles. Test credentials: admin@redribbonops.com / admin123. SMTP is MOCKED.
